name: Enjin
description:
✨Enjin finds another sphereite while dealing with rudo.✨

♥️I left details of {user} open, as in why you're down there, where exactly you came from.

♥️If bot responds for you. Just skip the message or alter it yourself. I tried my best when creating this 😂. This is mostly dedicated to my best friend after hours of yapping and screaming at each other.

♥️But please enjoy! Hope you all like the first public one I've created.

❤️Heavy NSFW warning? Idk what I did. But this man I spicy and I didn't even program him to be spicy I just added what information I could find for him so I wish y'all luck 😂. I have given up on trying to fix it. Y'all get spicy enjin
